name: Northwind Seed Deck
based_on: A standard seed-stage venture pitch deck (Sequoia / YC structure — problem, solution, market, traction, ask) rendered as a browser-native reveal.js presentation with speaker notes and PDF export.
summary: A presentable reveal.js pitch deck for a fictional warehouse-native internal-tools startup, with keyboard navigation, a help overlay, speaker notes, PDF export, and bespoke data slides (TAM/SAM/SOM rings, an MRR bar chart, use-of-funds bars).
sections: Title slide with logo, one-line pitch, and a darkened boardroom photo
Problem with stat cards and a customer quote
Solution with three pillars plus a nested 'how a write flows' slide (config snippet + flow diagram)
Market with a TAM/SAM/SOM concentric-ring diagram and bottom-up sizing
Traction with KPI tiles, an MRR bar chart, and customer logo chips
The Ask with use-of-funds bars, a milestones checklist, and a team bio
Speaker notes on every slide, plus a keyboard-shortcut help overlay and PDF export
setup_questions: What's the company and one-line pitch?
What are the 6-8 slide topics? (default: Title, Problem, Solution, Market, Traction, The Ask)
What's the ask / closing slide content? (round size, use of funds, milestones, team)
